title: Instruction Pair (SFT)
description: Single instruction-following training example emitted by Trainforge's synthesize_training stage. One JSONL line per pair. Shapes are intentionally flat so downstream SFT trainers (Alpaca/OpenAI) can remap with a single projection.

prompt.description: The instruction a model must answer. Must not contain a verbatim span of 50+ consecutive characters from the source chunk text.

completion.description: The target completion the model should produce.

chunk_id.description: Source chunk id from corpus/chunks.jsonl (e.g. sample_course_chunk_00042).

lo_refs.description: Learning-outcome refs the source chunk maps to. Never empty: chunks without LO refs do not generate pairs.

content_type.description: Content-type label from the source chunk. Free-string (derived from content_type_label or chunk_type when the label is missing).

seed.description: Seed used for deterministic template selection and sampling. Same chunk + same seed -> identical pair.

decision_capture_id.description: event_id from the decision-capture log that records why this pair was synthesized. Resolves against the run's decisions JSONL.

template_id.description: Id of the prompt template used (bloom-level x content-type). Optional but useful for debugging.

provider.description: Which synthesis provider produced the pair.
